shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books at night.
My favorite hobby is painting landscapes.
I usually take a walk in the park.
Cooking new recipes is very exciting for me.
I often watch documentaries on different cultures.
Traveling to new places opens my mind.
Meeting new people can be a rewarding experience.
I like to listen to music while I work out.
Gardening helps me relax and unwind after a long day.
Exploring local cuisine is a great way to learn about a culture.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about travel experiences.
questions: Q1: Can you share a memorable travel experience you had?
Q2: What challenges did you face during that trip?
Q3: How do you feel travel impacts personal growth?
Q4: What advice would you give to someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about exercise habits.
questions: Q1: What types of exercise do you enjoy doing?
Q2: Have you encountered any obstacles in maintaining a routine?
Q3: In your opinion, why is regular exercise important?
Q4: What tips would you offer someone who wants to get more active?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about eco-friendly practices.
questions: Q1: Can you describe an eco-friendly habit you practice regularly?
Q2: What difficulties have you faced in adopting sustainable habits?
Q3: How important do you believe it is to protect the environment?
Q4: What recommendations would you give to someone wanting to live more sustainably?
